meta.title: Capstan - WP-CLI Scaffolding for PressGang WordPress Projects
meta.description: Capstan is a WP-CLI package for scaffolding, configuring, and packaging PressGang WordPress projects. Dry-run by default, PHP 8.3+, and built for the PressGang ecosystem.

hero.badge: 🛞 WP-CLI package · PHP 8.3+ · dry-run by default
hero.title: A whole WordPress project,
hero.lede: Capstan scaffolds, configures, and packages [PressGang](https://pressgang.dev/) projects from the command line — WordPress core, parent theme, and child theme in one command. Like `artisan`, but it speaks WP-CLI.

terminal.label: ~/sites
terminal.code:
$ wp capstan new harbour-cafe

Plan (dry-run — nothing written yet):
＋ WordPress core (latest)   → ./harbour-cafe
＋ pressgang (parent theme)  → wp-content/themes/pressgang
＋ harbour-cafe (child)      → wp-content/themes/harbour-cafe
＋ composer.json · config/ · src/Controllers/

Proceed? [y/n] y

✔ All lines made fast. Ready to build.

sections.title: Heavy lifting, steady hands
sections.intro: The setup work that eats the first day of every project — done in the time it takes to pour a coffee.

cards.title: 🏗️ Scaffold everything
cards.body: WordPress core, the PressGang parent theme, and a ready-to-build child theme — controllers, `config/`, Composer autoloading, all wired.

cards.title: 🔍 Dry-run by default
cards.body: Every command prints its plan before it writes a byte. See exactly what will land where — then say yes.

cards.title: 📦 Package & configure
cards.body: Not just day one: Capstan configures and packages existing PressGang projects too — repeatable, scriptable, CI-friendly.

sections.title: Preview every plan before it writes a byte
body: Scaffolding tools that write first and explain later are how projects start with mystery files. Capstan inverts it: the plan is the default output, writing is the opt-in. The same philosophy as the rest of the [PressGang](https://pressgang.dev/) fleet — explicit over magic, nothing smuggled aboard.
sections.code:
$ wp capstan new harbour-cafe
# default — prints the plan only

Plan → review → confirm → write
# nothing lands without your say-so

sections.title: More than a WordPress starter theme generator
sections.intro: Day one is just the start. Capstan generates controllers, context getters and blocks for your PressGang themes from the command line, then configures and packages the whole WordPress theme for deployment — repeatable, scriptable, CI-friendly.

examples.label: Controller + Twig view
examples.code:
$ wp capstan make controller Events \
    --type=posts --view

＋ src/Controllers/EventsController.php
＋ Twig view — routed by convention

examples.label: Context getter, wired in
examples.code:
$ wp capstan context FrontPage \
    --add=news,events --force

＋ getters + $context_getters entries

examples.label: Block, config-registered
examples.code:
$ wp capstan make block hero \
    --title=Hero

＋ block + view — config-registered

examples.label: Custom post type, config-first
examples.code:
$ wp capstan make cpt event \
    --icon=dashicons-calendar

＋ config/custom-post-types.php entry

examples.label: See how a URL routes
examples.code:
$ wp capstan resolve /events/

# template → controller → view,
# resolved without a browser

examples.label: Health check
examples.code:
$ wp capstan doctor

# checks the rigging — versions,
# config, autoloading, routing

examples.label: New project, one command
examples.code:
$ wp capstan new harbour-cafe

# core + parent + child theme,
# Composer wired, plan first

examples.label: Child theme for an existing install
examples.code:
$ wp capstan make child my-theme

# controllers, config/, Twig views —
# into an existing WordPress install

examples.label: Package for deployment
examples.code:
$ wp capstan theme package \
    --output=release/my-theme.zip

# production archive, dev deps ashore

ecosystem.title: Built for the PressGang fleet
ecosystem.intro: Capstan is the launch ramp for [PressGang](https://pressgang.dev/) — the modern WordPress parent theme framework for Timber & Twig. Pair it with [Quartermaster](/quartermaster/) for fluent queries once you're underway.

footer.title: 🛞 Capstan
footer.summary: WP-CLI scaffolding for PressGang WordPress projects. Open source, MIT licensed. Part of the pressgang-wp fleet.
